title: EvidenceNeed treated as evidence
targetInvariant: EvidenceNeed states a gap; it is not evidence, observation, or accepted fact.
attackPattern: A compliance steward marks a gap as satisfied merely because an EvidenceNeed exists.
attemptedShortcut: Using a request object as its own satisfaction.

mustAllowIfAny: human review path where OFARM basis exists

farmerValueProtected: Stops task management artifacts from masquerading as proof.
readinessClaimImpact: Failure blocks any AI-agent/runtime/world-model readiness claim for the affected capability.
